description: Customer profiles: LTV, segment, churn risk, city.
chatbot_use_case: Segment analysis, city breakdown, high-value customers.

description: Line items. Many per order. Links to sellers and products.
join_hint: JOIN orders ON order_id. JOIN sellers ON seller_id.
chatbot_use_case: Product revenue, seller contribution, item-level discounts.

description: Core fact table. Revenue, profit, discount, status, timestamps. All money EGP.
key_columns: order_id (PK), customer_id, order_status, total_revenue, profit_margin, order_month, order_quarter
join_hint: JOIN customers ON customer_id. JOIN payments ON order_id AND payment_sequential=1.
chatbot_use_case: Monthly/quarterly revenue, profit, leakage counts. Use order_month for GROUP BY.

description: Payment records. Multiple rows per order. payment_sequential=1 is primary.
join_hint: JOIN orders ON order_id. Filter payment_sequential=1.
chatbot_use_case: Payment method breakdown, unpaid/partial orders, COD analysis.

description: ~7800 refund records. Flags for duplicates and early processing.
chatbot_use_case: Refund volume, duplicate refund detection, early refund flags.

description: ~262K reviews. Rating, sentiment, full text. WARNING: multiple per order possible.
join_hint: JOIN orders ON order_id. BEWARE: causes row duplication. Use mv_leakage_dashboard instead.
chatbot_use_case: Sentiment analysis, low-rating alerts, review text search.

description: Seller profiles with rating and risk metrics.
One row per order. Carrier, status, fees, logistics cost.
chatbot_use_case: Carrier performance, never_shipped detection, fee overcharge analysis.

description: One row per leakage scenario with counts and revenue impact.
chatbot_use_case: Which leakage type is most common or costly.

description: PRE-JOINED materialized view. ALWAYS use for order-level chatbot queries. 1 review per order (latest via LATERAL) — zero duplication risk.
key_columns: order_id, order_status, total_revenue, profit_margin, anomaly_flag, risk_tier, leakage_reason, sentiment
chatbot_use_case: PREFERRED for: order lookup, anomaly lists, cross-dimension queries.

description: Monthly aggregates: order counts, leakage rate, revenue at risk.
key_columns: month, total_orders, leakage_orders, leakage_rate_pct, revenue_at_risk, total_profit
chatbot_use_case: Monthly trend, worst month, leakage rate over time.
Top risky sellers, seller leakage ranking.

description: Junction: one row per (order, leakage_type). PREFERRED for scenario filtering.
chatbot_use_case: Show all orders with a specific scenario.

description: Vector store. Each row is one text chunk with 1536-dim embedding.
join_hint: Use rag.search_chunks() function for similarity search.
chatbot_use_case: RAG retrieval: find relevant reviews or leakage explanations by semantic similarity.
